reviews.comment:
Un desastre pagando con cualquier método de paga que no sea efectivo te cobran 10% de recargo

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster; paying with any payment method other than cash incurs a 10% surcharge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNndXFqLUhnEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención mayormente es pésima, casi siempre hay uno o dos personal para atender 50 móviles. Le dan más prioridad a los autos y a las motos las tienen esperando bajo el sol hasta que se les ocurra atender. En si, generalmente es un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
The service is generally terrible; there are almost always one or two staff members to handle 50 vehicles. They give priority to cars, and motorcycles are kept waiting in the sun until they decide to help. It's generally a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXejlLczFBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
El lugar está muy limpio, ordenado. Le faltan más opciones para comer algo y seguir viajando, especialmente los fines de semana.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very clean and tidy. It needs more options for food and snacks while traveling, especially on weekends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdWQ2MVFBEAE
